sys_script_include.description: This script include loads the icons and text messages for Tasker Widgets. STRY0117951 - Org Hierarchy- Preset view buttons- New "Vertical and Horizontal" button 2.8 | 2022-03-15 | raj | This will be updated to include the information for all widgets to improve resusability and standardization across all widgets. 2.8 | 2022-03-13 | raj | STRY0117947 - Org Hierarchy Bifold- Revamp- New Navigation Links in Bifold Header 2.8 | 2022-03-13 | raj| STRY0117949 - Org Hierarchy Bifold- Revamp- Tree Widget Header Update 2.8 | 2022-03-10 | mmcc | STRY0114453 - Org Hierarchy Full Screen- Tree Node- Avatar Control- Popover Panel Added Message key 'Tasker - Open Contact Page' 2.8 | 2022-03-04 | mmcc | STRY0114453 - Org Hierarchy Full Screen- Tree Node- Avatar Control- Popover Panel Added BusinessPhone16, Mail16, Phone16 and SendMessage24 Added Message key 'Tasker - Tasker Message: Organizational Unit: ' Added Message key 'Tasker - Button - Message' 2.8 | 2022-02-19 - raj - DFCT0010796 - Tooltip is incorrect on the Org Hier. "Maximize" and "Minimize " iconsDFCT0010796
sys_script_include.name: TaskerWidgetIconsAndMessages
